creator: Mineia Martins
attribution_text: Photo by Mineia Martins on Pexels
visual_description: Abstract blue glass office facade filling the frame: a reflective curtain-wall window grid in deep navy/blue tones, geometric and sky-free.
text_safe_notes: Self-check 1080 centre-crop @0.55 scrim: even mid-detail window grid, no single focal object competing at centre; deep navy reads well behind white/teal headline. Legible.
warnings: uniform window-grid detail spans the whole frame; confirm headline contrast under scrim

creator: Jan van der Wolf
attribution_text: Photo by Jan van der Wolf on Pexels
visual_description: Teal glass curtain wall with regular vertical brass/gold mullions on a diagonal composition.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: regular vertical striping, low focal clutter; teal matches brand palette; gold mullions add a warm accent. Legible.
warnings: regular diagonal lines may interfere with a centred text baseline; warm gold accent alongside teal

creator: Jan van der Wolf
attribution_text: Photo by Jan van der Wolf on Pexels
visual_description: Modern glass building corner against a clear blue sky; upper area is clean open sky.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: upper sky provides clean negative space, centre is the building edge; scrim keeps headline legible. Best placed mid-lower.
warnings: bright high-key sky at top; keep headline off the brightest sky zone

creator: Mikitayo
visual_description: Sweeping curved silver/white modern architecture — a smooth metal-and-glass curve (portrait framing).
text_safe_notes: Self-check: smooth curved surfaces, low text competition, cool neutral tone; legible under scrim.
warnings: some bright highlights along the curve

creator: Ronald van Eendenburg
attribution_text: Photo by Ronald van Eendenburg on Pexels
visual_description: Teal-green rectangular cladding/glass panels in regular diagonal rows (building-facade texture).
text_safe_notes: Self-check: regular low-detail panel grid, teal-green brand-compatible, even under scrim. Legible.
warnings: regular panel seams; verify no moire against text

creator: Allec Gomes
attribution_text: Photo by Allec Gomes on Pexels
visual_description: Deep navy silky soft waves — a smooth dark gradient texture with very low detail across the whole frame.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: dark uniform navy negative space everywhere; ideal scrim backdrop; excellent headline legibility. Matches brand navy.

creator: Eva Bronzini
attribution_text: Photo by Eva Bronzini on Pexels
visual_description: Dark teal-to-navy horizontal gradient wash with a subtle teal band.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: very low detail, dark, clean; brand teal/navy; excellent overlay legibility.

creator: Eva Bronzini
attribution_text: Photo by Eva Bronzini on Pexels
visual_description: Deep navy near-solid gradient (a dark blue night-sky wash).
text_safe_notes: Self-check: almost flat dark navy, maximal negative space; excellent headline legibility.

creator: UP Modern
attribution_text: Photo by UP Modern on Pexels
visual_description: Predominantly black frame with a soft lavender/blue light curve in the lower-left (3D render).
text_safe_notes: Self-check: predominantly black negative space, minimal detail; headline sits clean over black.
warnings: accent curve leans lavender/purple — slightly off the navy/teal palette; predominantly black so low impact

creator: Evija Ciematniece
attribution_text: Photo by Evija Ciematniece on Pexels
visual_description: Radial blue light streaks emanating from a dark central vanishing point on deep navy — a calm motion/information-flow register.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: the dark centre is clean negative space with the headline zone in the calmest area; streaks radiate to the edges. Legible if headline kept central.
warnings: radial streaks toward the edges; keep headline within the central dark zone

creator: Solen Feyissa
attribution_text: Photo by Solen Feyissa on Pexels
visual_description: Teal connected lines and scattered dots/bubbles on black — a connected-dots / node register.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: large black negative space; the dots-and-lines motif reads as network/connection; legible.
warnings: some brighter dot clusters in the upper area

creator: Valentin Ivantsov
attribution_text: Photo by Valentin Ivantsov on Pexels
visual_description: Bright blue folded line-mesh grid surface — an abstract grid/mesh.
text_safe_notes: Self-check: the grid/mesh fills the frame and is brighter/busier; competes more with a headline; calmest near edges. Alternate only.
warnings: bright saturated blue and busy mesh lower text-contrast; offered as an alternate, not for the calmest layouts

creator: Merlin
visual_description: Two glowing wireframe network spheres joined by a luminous bridge on teal (plexus/node render).
text_safe_notes: Self-check: the bright connection glows through the centre and competes with a centred headline; corners are darker. Consider a lower/off-centre headline.
warnings: bright centre bridge reduces central legibility
